name: Magic Caramel Pudding (Caramelized Eagle Brand Milk)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place one or more unopened cans of Eagle Brand Sweetened Condensed Milk in a kettle of boiling water and keep at boiling point for three hours, being careful to keep the can well covered with water.
2. Chill thoroughly.
3. Warm the can by immersing it in hot water for about one minute.
4. Punch a hole in the bottom of the can.
5. Remove the top of the can using a can-opener, cutting along the side just below the top edge, starting at the seam.
6. Loosen the caramel from the sides of the can with a table knife dipped in hot water.
7. Turn the can onto a plate.
8. Cut into slices with a knife dipped in hot water.
NOTE: If using a pressure cooker to caramelize the milk, apply 15 pounds pressure for 50 minutes.
